name: Carrot Cake Cupcakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) and line two muffin pans with cupcake liners.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
3. In another mixing bowl, beat the eggs at medium speed until blended.
4. Gradually beat in the granulated sugar and dark brown sugar. Add the vanilla extract, vegetable oil, and orange juice, and mix until combined and smooth.
5. On low speed, gradually mix in one-third of the flour mixture. Scrape down the sides as necessary.
6. Continue to add the flour mixture in thirds until just smooth.
7. Gently fold in the grated carrots, chopped walnuts, and chocolate morsels.
8. Fill each muffin cup about two-thirds full with the batter.
9. Bake for 18 to 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Cool on a wire rack for 15 to 20 minutes before removing from the muffin tins.
11. Frost with Cream Cheese Frosting.
Yield: 1 1/2 to 2 dozen cupcakes
